doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program authorizing paralegals to perform these legal services.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program, and the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission does not issue protocols authorizing paralegals to perform legal services that would otherwise constitute unauthorized practice of law.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program authorizing paralegals to perform these legal services.
